emails.subject: Virginia Electric & Power
emails.body: Virginia Electric Power Elizabeth, Who will be taking over Janice's negotiations with VEPCO? Their attorney, Shelley, called and wanted the new Enron attorney to give her a call. Her number is 804-273-4149. I apologize that I received this call this morning, but am not getting to you until now. Paul

emails.subject: Re: Virginia Electric & Power
emails.body: Re: Virginia Electric Power Hi Paul I have asked JANET MOORE to pick this up from Janice. JANET's number is 57400.
